steps.title: Use the detail clue
steps.content: The second sentence explains that Bennett paid close attention to all the details of his Harlem neighborhood. The blank must describe a quality connected to careful noticing.

steps.title: Select the attention word
steps.content: Choice A means doubtful, Choice C means judgmental, and Choice D means self-assured. None of those means attentive to details. The word that means watchful and detail-oriented fits Bennett's process. The answer is B.
